# zares

> Zero-runtime Atomic Rust CSS Engine (Static). Write components with a styled-components-inspired API (`tw.button({...})`); a Rust engine compiles them to static Tailwind CSS at build time. No runtime CSS-in-JS.

## Getting Started
- [Installation](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#instalasi): `npm install zares` + `npx tw setup`
- [Setup: Next.js](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#nextjs)
- [Setup: Vite](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#vite)
- [Setup: Rspack](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#rspack)

## API Reference
- [Template Literal](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#1-template-literal): `` tw.button`...` ``
- [Object Config](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#2-object-config-direkomendasikan): variants, compoundVariants, defaultVariants
- [Sub-Components](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#3-sub-components): `sub: { "tag:name": "..." }`
- [`cv()` Class Variant Function](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#4-cv--class-variant-function)
- [`states` Boolean Props](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#5-states--boolean-props)
- [`state` CSS Data-Attribute](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#6-state--css-data-attribute-zero-js-state)
- [`.extend()` Inheritance](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#7-extend--inheritance)
- [`container` Container Queries](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#8-container--container-queries)
- [`server.` Server Components](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#9-server--server-components-only)
- [`createStyledSystem()` Design Token Factory](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#10-createstyledsystem--design-system-factory)
- [`liveToken()` Live Design Tokens](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#11-livetoken--live-design-tokens)
- [`cn()`, `cx()`, `twMerge`](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#12-cn-cx-twmerge)

## Theming
- [Theme Setup](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#setup-tema)
- [Using Theme in Components](https://github.com/Dictionar32/zares/blob/main/README.md#gunakan-di-komponen)
